title: Agent Type And Checkout Handoff Rendering
purpose: Use only the handoff fields returned for the current Agent Type and make the human Checkout visible on that surface.
when_to_use: buy, services checkout, checkout, or pay returned a human handoff.
The human cannot see the QR image or Checkout link.

host_contracts.responsibility: attach handoff.qr_local_path and show handoff.url or the returned markdown in the current desktop conversation
render only in a terminal the human is actually watching and show the Checkout URL
attach handoff.qr_local_path and show handoff.url or the returned markdown in the current desktop conversation
render only in a terminal the human is actually watching and show the Checkout URL
send the returned Checkout URL and any usable image attachment to the current chat

commands.intent: confirm the current Agent Type contract
commands.success_signal: the exact default Host and presentation responsibility are returned
only handoff fields usable by the current Host are returned

agent_rules: Agent Type is stable identity; Host is presentation and may be explicitly overridden.
A local QR path is not visible until the Agent attaches or renders that file on the human-facing surface.
Do not claim the handoff was shown until both a usable payment image or QR and the Checkout URL are visible.
IM Hosts that require a target must receive --target; the initial five Agent Types currently default to desktop, terminal, or plain-chat Hosts.
forbidden: Do not expose display tokens separately from the tokenized Checkout handoff.
Do not print base64 images, mirror lists, renderer debug state, or provider QR URLs.
Do not claim a desktop attachment exists when only a filesystem path was printed.
